mapper.select:
SELECT SRTP.SRTypeCode AS 'srTypeCode', DIC.Name as 'srTypeName'
FROM XBOLTAPP.ESM_SR_TYPE SRTP WITH(NOLOCK)
INNER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_DICTIONARY DIC on DIC.TypeCode = SRTP.SRTypeCode
WHERE SRTP.Deactivated = '0' AND SRTP.ProcModelID IS NOT NULL AND DIC.Category = 'SRTP' and DIC.LanguageID = #{languageID}

SELECT
TT.Name as CompanyName, TM.ClientID,
TD5.Name as ProcessName, TD4.Name as CategoryNM, TD3.Name as SubCategoryNM, ESM.SRType, ESM.Category, ESM.SubCategory,
TIA.PlainText as SRArea1NM, TIA2.PlainText as SRArea2NM, ESM.SRArea1, ESM.SRArea2,
ISNULL(COUNT(*),0) AS TicketReceived,
ISNULL(SUM(CASE WHEN ESM.CompletionDT IS NOT NULL AND ESM.Blocked != 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END),0) AS TotalCompleted,
ISNULL(SUM(CASE WHEN ESM.Blocked != 0 AND ESM.CompletionDT IS NOT NULL AND (ESM.DueDate IS NULL OR ESM.Duedate >= CAST(ISNULL(ESM.CompletionDT,GETDATE()) AS DATE)) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END),0) AS CompletedSuccessfully,
ISNULL(SUM(CASE WHEN ESM.Blocked != 0 AND ESM.CompletionDT IS NOT NULL AND ESM.DueDate IS NOT NULL AND ESM.Duedate < CAST(ISNULL(ESM.CompletionDT,GETDATE()) AS DATE) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END),0) AS CompletedDelay,
ISNULL(SUM(CASE WHEN ESM.CompletionDT IS NULL AND ESM.Blocked = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END),0) AS Incomplete,
CASE WHEN SUM(CASE WHEN ESM.CompletionDT IS NOT NULL AND ESM.Blocked != 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) = 0 THEN 0 ELSE CAST( 100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN ESM.Blocked != 0 AND ESM.CompletionDT IS NOT NULL AND (ESM.DueDate IS NULL OR ESM.Duedate >= CAST(ISNULL(ESM.CompletionDT,GETDATE()) AS DATE)) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / NULLIF(SUM(CASE WHEN ESM.CompletionDT IS NOT NULL AND ESM.Blocked != 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS DECIMAL(5,2) ) END AS SuccessRate
FROM XBOLTAPP.ESM_SR_MST ESM INNER JOIN XBOLTAPP.ESM_SR_MST TSM WITH(NOLOCK) ON ESM.SRID = TSM.SRID
Left Outer Join XBOLTADM.TB_MEMBER TM WITH(NOLOCK) ON TSM.ReceiptUserID = TM.MemberID Left Outer Join XBOLTAPP.CRM_CUST_MST CCM WITH(NOLOCK) ON TM.ClientID = CCM.CustomerNo Left Outer Join XBOLTADM.TB_TEAM_TXT TT WITH(NOLOCK) ON TT.TeamID = CCM.TeamID And TT.LanguageID = #{languageID}
Left Outer Join XBOLTADM.TB_DICTIONARY TD4 WITH(NOLOCK) On TD4.TypeCode = TSM.Category AND TD4.Category = 'SRCAT' And TD4.LanguageID = #{languageID} Left Outer Join XBOLTADM.TB_DICTIONARY TD3 WITH(NOLOCK) On TD3.TypeCode = TSM.SubCategory And TD3.Category = 'SRCAT' And TD3.LanguageID = #{languageID} Left Outer Join XBOLTADM.TB_DICTIONARY TD5 WITH(NOLOCK) On TD5.TypeCode = TSM.SRType And TD5.Category = 'SRTP' And TD5.LanguageID = #{languageID}
Left Outer Join XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM TIS WITH(NOLOCK) ON TSM.Status = TIS.Identifier AND ESM.SRArea1 = TIS.ItemID Left Outer Join XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR TIA WITH(NOLOCK) ON TIA.ItemID = TSM.SRArea1 And TIA.AttrTypeCode = 'AT00001' And TIA.LanguageID = #{languageID} Left Outer Join XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR TIA2 WITH(NOLOCK) ON TIA2.ItemID = TSM.SRArea2 And TIA2.AttrTypeCode = 'AT00001' And TIA2.LanguageID = #{languageID}
AND TM.ClientID in (${clientIDs})
AND TM.CompanyID in (${companyIDs})
AND ESM.SRType in (${srTypes})
AND ESM.Category in (${categories})
AND ESM.SubCategory in (${subCategories})
AND ESM.SRArea1 in (${service})
AND ESM.SRArea2 in (${part})
AND ESM.RegDT BETWEEN CAST(#{regStartDate} AS DATETIME) AND DATEADD(MS, -2, DATEADD(DAY,1,CAST(#{regEndDate} AS DATETIME)))
GROUP BY
TT.Name, TD5.Name, TD4.Name, TD3.Name, ESM.SRType, ESM.Category, ESM.SubCategory, TM.ClientID
TT.Name, TIA.PlainText, TIA2.PlainText, ESM.SRArea1, ESM.SRArea2, TM.ClientID
ORDER BY
TT.Name, TD5.Name, TD4.Name, TD3.Name
TT.Name, TIA.PlainText, TIA2.PlainText

WITH SrCountByManagerMst AS ( SELECT MEMBER.ClientID as ManagerClientID, TEAMTEXT.Name AS TeamName, MEMBER.Name AS ManagerName, SRMST.ReceiptUserID AS ManagerID, COUNT(*) AS AssignedTotalCount, SUM(CASE WHEN SRMST.CompletionDT IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS CompletedTotalCount,
SUM( CASE WHEN SRMST.CompletionDT IS NOT NULL AND CONVERT(date, SRMST.CompletionDT) <= CONVERT(date, SRMST.DueDate) THEN 1 WHEN SRMST.CompletionDT IS NOT NULL AND SRMST.Duedate IS NULL THEN 1 WHEN LastLog.Status IN ('04','06','08') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS CompletedOnTimeCount,
SUM(CASE WHEN SRMST.CompletionDT IS NOT NULL AND CONVERT(date,SRMST.CompletionDT) > CONVERT(date,SRMST.DueDate) And LastLog.Status NOT IN ('04','06','08') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS DelayedCompletedCount,
SUM(CASE WHEN SRMST.CompletionDT IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS IncompletedCount
FROM XBOLTAPP.ESM_SR_MST SRMST INNER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_TEAM_TXT TEAMTEXT ON SRMST.ReceiptTeamID = TEAMTEXT.TeamID AND TEAMTEXT.LanguageID = #{languageID} INNER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_MEMBER MEMBER ON SRMST.ReceiptUserID = MEMBER.MemberID INNER JOIN (SELECT AL.PID, AL.Status FROM XBOLTAPP.ESM_ACTIVITY_LOG AL INNER JOIN ( SELECT PID, MAX(ActivityLogID) AS MaxID FROM XBOLTAPP.ESM_ACTIVITY_LOG GROUP BY PID ) X ON X.PID = AL.PID AND X.MaxID = AL.ActivityLogID ) LastLog ON LastLog.PID = SRMST.SRID WHERE SRMST.ReceiptUserID IS NOT NULL
AND MEMBER.ClientID = #{clientID}
AND MEMBER.ClientID in (${clientIDs})
AND SRMST.CompanyID in (${companyIDs})
AND SRMST.ReceiptTeamID = #{receiptTeamID}
AND SRMST.RegDT >= CAST(#{regStartDate} AS DATETIME)
AND SRMST.RegDT <= DATEADD(MS, -2, DATEADD(DAY,1,CAST(#{regEndDate} AS DATETIME)))
GROUP BY MEMBER.ClientID, TEAMTEXT.Name, SRMST.ReceiptUserID, MEMBER.Name ) SELECT TEAMTEXTCLIENT.Name AS CompanyName, SrCountByManagerMst.TeamName, SrCountByManagerMst.ManagerName, SrCountByManagerMst.ManagerID,
SrCountByManagerMst.AssignedTotalCount, SrCountByManagerMst.CompletedTotalCount, SrCountByManagerMst.CompletedOnTimeCount,
CASE WHEN SrCountByManagerMst.CompletedTotalCount > 0 THEN ROUND( (CAST(SrCountByManagerMst.CompletedOnTimeCount AS FLOAT) / SrCountByManagerMst.CompletedTotalCount) * 100, 2 ) ELSE 0 END AS OnTimePercentage,
SrCountByManagerMst.DelayedCompletedCount, SrCountByManagerMst.IncompletedCount,
SrCountByManagerMst.ManagerClientID
FROM SrCountByManagerMst
INNER JOIN XBOLTAPP.CRM_CUST_MST CUSTMST ON CUSTMST.CustomerNo = SrCountByManagerMst.ManagerClientID
INNER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_TEAM_TXT TEAMTEXTCLIENT ON TEAMTEXTCLIENT.TeamID = CUSTMST.TeamID AND TEAMTEXTCLIENT.LanguageID = #{languageID}
ORDER BY SrCountByManagerMst.ManagerClientID, SrCountByManagerMst.ManagerName
SELECT ReportCode, BatchName, SenderAcc, SenderName, SenderPwd, EmailSvrDomain, Subject, Body, Receiver, CC, DocumentID FROM XBOLTDLM.SEND_BATCH_MAIL

SELECT TMT.Name AS CustGRName , TMT2.Name AS CustomerName , ESM.ClientID , CCM.CustGRNo , COUNT(*) AS TicketCount , SUM(CASE WHEN ESM.CompletionDT IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS TotalCompleted FROM XBOLTAPP.ESM_SR_MST ESM INNER JOIN XBOLTAPP.CRM_CUST_MST CCM ON ESM.ClientID = CCM.CustomerNo INNER JOIN XBOLTAPP.CRM_CUST_MST CCM2 ON CCM2.CustomerNO = CCM.CustGRNo INNER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_TEAM_TXT TMT ON TMT.TeamID = CCM2.TeamID AND TMT.LanguageID = #{languageID} INNER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_TEAM_TXT TMT2 ON TMT2.TeamID = CCM.TeamID AND TMT2.LanguageID = #{languageID}
AND CCM2.CustomerNo in (${custGRNos})
AND ESM.RegDT BETWEEN CAST(#{regStartDate} AS DATETIME) AND DATEADD(MS, -2, DATEADD(DAY,1,CAST(#{regEndDate} AS DATETIME)))
GROUP BY TMT.Name , TMT2.Name , ESM.ClientID , CCM.CustGRNo ORDER BY TMT.Name ASC, TMT2.Name ASC
